zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton於1314年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，他的父親John Halyburton of Dirleton25歲，母親Lady Agatha de Vaux24歲。他於1354年與Margaret Cameron在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓享年78歲。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton was born in 1314, in Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, John Halyburton of Dirleton, was 25 and his mother, Lady Agatha de Vaux, was 24. He married Margaret Cameron in 1354, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1392, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton est né en 1314, à Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, John Halyburton of Dirleton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Agatha de Vaux, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cameron en 1354, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1392, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirletonが1314年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Halyburton of Dirletonは25歳，母Lady Agatha de Vauxは24歳であった。1354年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンでMargaret Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton(이)가 1314년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Halyburton of Dirleton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agatha de Vaux(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1354년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 Margaret Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton родился в 1314 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Halyburton of Dirleton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agatha de Vaux, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cameron в 1354 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
